summary: Event Mode testing complete. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend Playwright UI tests passed. Verified Event Home (list with timing grouping, urgency colors, type filter), Event Prep (athletes with prep status, target schools with overlap, checklist toggle with progress bar, blockers section), Live Event Mode (dark theme, athlete/school chips, interest levels, note capture with counter increment, recent feed), Event Summary (stats, hottest interest sorted, follow-up actions, schools seen), and Navigation (Events tab in header, back buttons on all pages). Routing to Support Pod creates actions and timeline entries correctly.
test_credentials: No auth required - mock data backend
seed_data_creation: Used existing mock data. event_0 has 5 pre-populated notes for summary testing, event_1 used for prep/live testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Event Mode testing complete. All 4 Event screens verified: (1) Event Home (/events) - upcoming events grouped by timing (today/thisweek/later), past events tab, type filter, urgency colors (red for tomorrow with no prep, yellow for soon with incomplete prep, green for ready, gray for past), action buttons per event state (Go Live/Start Prep/Continue Prep/View Summary). (2) Event Prep (/events/event_1/prep) - athletes attending with prep status (ready/needs_attention/blocker), target schools with overlap counts, prep checklist with toggle functionality and progress bar, blockers section for athletes with issues, Go Live button. (3) Live Event Mode (/events/event_1/live) - dark theme (bg-gray-900), athlete chip selector, school chip selector, interest level buttons (Hot/Warm/Cool/None), quick note text field, follow-up checkboxes, LOG NOTE button captures note and shows in recent feed, note counter increments. (4) Post-Event Summary (/events/event_0/summary) - event stats (notes/schools/athletes/follow-ups), hottest interest section sorted by level, follow-up actions list, Route to Pod button per note, Route All to Support Pods bulk button, schools seen with interaction counts. Routing creates Support Pod actions and timeline entries. Navigation works between Mission Control and Events via header.

event_home: Past events have summaryStatus and capturedNotesCount
event_prep: PATCH /api/events/:eventId/checklist/:itemId toggles item and updates prepStatus
Blockers populated for athletes with issues
event_summary: Hottest interest sorted by level (hot first, then warm)
Schools seen have name and interaction counts
routing: Routing creates Support Pod actions with source='event'
Routing creates timeline entries with tag='event_routed'

event_home: Event cards display with urgency colors
Action buttons show correct text per state
event_prep: Go Live button navigates to Live Event
Athletes section shows 6 athletes with prep status
Target schools section shows schools with overlap
live_event: Full note capture flow works (select athlete -> school -> interest -> note -> followup -> LOG NOTE)
New note appears in recent feed
Back button navigates to Event Prep
event_summary: Event stats visible (5 notes, 4 schools, 4 athletes, 5 follow-ups)
Hottest Interest section visible with 4 hot/warm notes
Follow-up Actions section visible with 5 actions
navigation: Events tab visible in header navigation
Click Mission Control tab navigates back to /mission-control
Back buttons work on all Event pages

event_mode_verification.event_home_urgency_colors: VERIFIED - red/yellow/green/gray based on prep status and days away
event_mode_verification.event_prep_checklist_toggle: VERIFIED - toggle updates count and prepStatus
event_mode_verification.event_prep_blockers: VERIFIED - shows athletes with blocker interventions
event_mode_verification.live_event_note_capture: VERIFIED - full flow works with counter increment
event_mode_verification.summary_route_to_pod: VERIFIED - creates actions and timeline entries
